content.intro: The Apex27 CRM integration allows PropertyGoose to sync properties, landlords, tenants, and tenancy events directly with your Apex27 account, keeping both systems in step without manual duplication.

steps.title: Go to Settings → Integrations → Apex27 CRM
steps.content: Navigate to Settings, open the Integrations tab, and find the Apex27 CRM section.

steps.title: Enter Your Apex27 API Key
steps.content: Enter your Apex27 API key. You can find this in your Apex27 account settings under API or Developer options.

steps.title: Save
steps.content: Click Save to connect the integration. PropertyGoose will test the API key and confirm the connection.

steps.title: Syncing Begins Automatically
steps.content: Once connected, PropertyGoose begins syncing automatically: active property listings, landlord records, tenant records, and documents are pushed to and pulled from Apex27.

steps.title: Let Agreed Status Pushed Automatically
steps.content: When a tenancy is created in PropertyGoose, the Let Agreed status is pushed to the matching property listing in Apex27 automatically.

steps.title: Documents Can Be Pushed to Apex27
steps.content: Documents generated in PropertyGoose — including tenancy agreements and compliance packs — can be pushed to the corresponding records in Apex27.

sections.title: Allow Up to 5 Minutes for Sync
sections.content: The Apex27 sync runs in the background. Allow up to 5 minutes for new or updated records to appear in Apex27 after a change is made in PropertyGoose.
